import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    if not in_num
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      in_num = true
    end
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
  else if b == 45 and not in_num
    in_num = true
    sign = -1
    cur = 0
  else
    if in_num
      nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign)
      in_num = false
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign)
  in_num = false
end

mut result: List<Int> = []
mut cur_max = 0
mut first = true
for x in nums
  if first
    cur_max = x
    first = false
  else
    if x > cur_max
      cur_max = x
    end
  end
  result = list.push(result, cur_max)
end

mut out = ""
mut idx = 0
for v in result
  if idx == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  idx = idx + 1
end

println(out)
